message:
test(bd-1p24): add unit tests for auth, duration, detection, theme

Cover untested branches across four modules:
- auth.rs: AuthContext Default/Debug/Clone, full serde roundtrip, AUTH_STATE_KEY, AccessToken serde (7 new → 13 total)
- duration.rs: ParseDurationError Display/Error/Debug/Clone, specific error variants for each parse failure path, whitespace-separated components (9 new → 16 total)
- detection.rs: Copy semantics, Debug for Human, detect() validity, agent/rich consistency (4 new → 10 total)
- theme.rs: neutral palette, info/secondary colors, all remaining styles, Debug (4 new → 8 total)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
